subject: losing customers two ways
body:
Shawn,

I searched "lawn care Columbus Indiana" and Pahl's Lawn Care, Buck's Mowing, and Jeff's Lawn Care all came up before Hawkins. That's problem one.

Problem two -- your website still has broken testimonials and dev URLs showing. A customer who does find you sees a site that looks like it hasn't been touched since 2016.

You've been at this since 2001 with a BBB membership to back it up. That should show online.

I fix both problems. Would a quick call this week make sense?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
